prompt: I make YouTube videos about AI tools. I need help organizing my research notes, scripts, and production files so Claude can help me at each stage without forgetting my brand voice guidelines

assertions.text: Response uses content-appropriate stage names (research, writing/script, production, distribution — not generic code stages like src/, tests/)
Response includes a dedicated voice or brand guidelines file (e.g. _config/voice.md or similar) with tone, phrases, and audience sections
Response uses structured stage contracts with Inputs/Process/Outputs format (or equivalent structured sections) in stage CONTEXT.md files
Response explains how brand voice stays persistent across stages — referenced as stable input rather than repeated in each stage
Response explains how output from one stage feeds into the next (research output becomes script input, etc.)
